name: Portabello Mushrooms, Pasta and Fresh Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 portabello mushrooms each about 4-5 inches in diameter, rinsed and stemmed
1/2 cup coarsely grated fresh Parmesan cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Fresh Tomato Sauce, and keep warm.
2. In a bowl, combine the flour with the Creole Seasoning until thoroughly blended.
3. Dredge each mushroom in the seasoned flour mixture, shaking off any excess.
4. Heat the remaining oil in a large skillet over high heat. When hot and almost smoking, add the mushrooms, top side first, and sauté them for about 1 minute on each side. Remove from skillet.
5. Cook pasta according to package instructions and drain.
6. To serve, mound 1/2 cup of pasta in each serving bowl. Place 1 mushroom, top side up, on each pasta serving. Drizzle with 1/2 cup of sauce, and sprinkle with 2 tablespoons of Parmesan cheese.
